name: INTESTINAL PSEUDOOBSTRUCTION
definition: decreased ability of intestines to push food through PSEUDOMEGACOLON = ADULT MEGACOLON = ADYNAMIC ILEUS = FUNCTIONAL OBSTRUCTION IDIOPATHIC LARGE-BOWEL OBSTRUCTION = OGILVIE SYNDROME rare clinical disorder with signs & symptoms & radiographic appearance of an acute recurrent or persistent pseudobstruction of colon nonpropulsive intestine characterized by impaired response to intestinal dilatation without

demographics.Age: > 60 years / younger patient with spinal disorder; M > F
demographics.Path: atrophic changes + decreased numbers of intramural ganglia (= sign of irreversible

dominant_finding: marked colonic dilatation: cecum (4-10 cm), transverse colon (8.2-13.7 cm)
distribution: intermediate transitional zone at / adjacent to splenic flexure (= transition zone of
discriminating_features: nonspecific findings of gaseous distention of colon
